title: QuickSort
description: QuickSort is a fast and lightweight client-side mod that instantly sorts your inventory, chests, and containers with one key, featuring smart item grouping, stack optimization, and trash filtering.
body:
## 📦 QuickSort – Smart Inventory Sorting Mod

**QuickSort** is a fast, lightweight client-side Minecraft mod that lets you instantly organize your inventory, chests, and containers with a single key press. Designed for efficiency and simplicity, it removes clutter and keeps your items perfectly arranged at all times.

---

## 🚀 Features

### 🧠 Intelligent Item Grouping

Automatically sorts items into categories:

* Tools, Weapons, Armor
* Food and consumables
* Blocks and building materials
* Redstone components
* Resources and miscellaneous items

---

### 📦 Stack Optimization

* Automatically merges partial stacks
* Maximizes inventory space
* Reduces clutter instantly

---

### 🚮 Trash Filter System

* Detects unwanted items like:

  * Cobblestone
  * Dirt
  * Seeds
* Fully customizable via config

---

### 🎮 Hotbar Priority

* Keeps important items ready:

  * Pickaxe, Sword, Food
* Improves gameplay efficiency

---

### 🔁 Auto Sort (Optional)

* Automatically sorts when:

  * Opening containers
  * Picking up items
* Can be enabled/disabled in config

---

### ⚙️ Customization

* Config file: `config/quicksort.json`
* Customize:

  * Sort behavior
  * Trash items
  * Keybind
  * Feature toggles

---

### 🌍 Multi-Language Support

* English
* Hindi
* German
* French
* Spanish

---

## 🛠️ Technical Info

* Minecraft: **1.21.11 (Fabric)**
* Requires Fabric API
* Client-side only (no server needed)

---

## 🎯 Why QuickSort?

Managing inventory manually wastes time. QuickSort automates everything so you can focus on gameplay, building, and exploration without interruptions.

---

💡 *Clean inventory = better gameplay.*
⚡ *Sort instantly. Play smarter.*

---
